title: Agentic Aggregation for Parallel Scaling of Long-Horizon Agentic Tasks
summary: We study parallel test-time scaling for long-horizon agentic tasks such as agentic search and deep research, where multiple rollouts are generated in parallel and aggregated into a final response. While such scaling has proven effective...
